text.title: Accessibility Testing Process Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four layers covered (or each missing layer has a documented waiver)?

branch.question: Are at least two screen readers covered (desktop + mobile)?
Is severity within enum on every finding and evidence_url attached?

text.example: Concrete walk: Faion Web audit covers axe+manual+NVDA+VoiceOver+3-user-panel; severity all enum; evidence URLs attached → publish.
